collectiondata.overview:
Dubai Tour Packages – A City of Wonders with Travelxploria


Step into Dubai, a city where dazzling skyscrapers rise from golden deserts, ancient traditions meet modern luxury, and every corner promises unforgettable experiences. With Travelxploria, your Best Travel Agency and trusted Best International Tour Operator, explore Dubai through thoughtfully crafted tour packages designed for families, honeymooners, and adventurers alike.
Begin your journey at the iconic Burj Khalifa, where panoramic views from the world’s tallest building take your breath away. Stroll through the sprawling Dubai Mall, a shopper’s paradise, and catch the mesmerizing Dubai Fountain shows that light up the evenings with music and water artistry. Our Dubai tour packages from Delhi, Mumbai, Kolkata, and beyond ensure you experience the city’s highlights with ease and comfort.
Venture into the historic Al Fahidi District to discover Dubai’s rich heritage, then take a traditional abra boat ride across Dubai Creek for a glimpse of old-world charm amidst the futuristic skyline. Families love our Dubai tour packages for family, offering fun-filled days at Dubai Parks and Resorts, Aquaventure Waterpark, and the thrilling IMG Worlds of Adventure.
No visit to Dubai is complete without a thrilling desert safari, where you can experience dune bashing, camel rides, sandboarding, and enjoy a magical evening of traditional entertainment and dinner under the stars in a Bedouin-style camp. This unforgettable experience is a highlight of Travelxploria’s best value tour packages.
Expand your adventure with an exciting Abu Dhabi city tour, included in many of our Dubai packages, where you’ll marvel at the majestic Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque, explore the luxurious Emirates Palace, and unleash your inner speed demon at Ferrari World—the world’s largest indoor theme park, packed with high-octane thrills for all ages.
Whether you’re savoring gourmet dining in Downtown Dubai, exploring the vibrant souks of the Gold and Spice Market, or enjoying the futuristic thrills at IMG Worlds, Travelxploria’s expertly crafted packages blend culture, luxury, and excitement seamlessly.
Booking Dubai tour packages from Delhi, Mumbai, Kolkata, or elsewhere? Trust Travelxploria, the Best Tour Operator, to craft your perfect Dubai getaway—whether for family fun, romantic escapes, or solo adventures.
Discover Dubai and beyond with Travelxploria—where every journey becomes an extraordinary story.

packages.overview:
• Burj Khalifa – The world’s tallest building, offering breathtaking city views from its observation decks.

  • Palm Jumeirah – A man-made island home to luxury resorts, including Atlantis, The Palm.

  • Burj Al Arab – The world-famous sail-shaped luxury hotel.

  • Dubai Frame – A unique structure providing panoramic views of old and new Dubai.

  • Dubai Mall – One of the largest malls in the world, featuring an indoor aquarium, ice rink, and luxury shopping.

  • Mall of the Emirates – Home to Ski Dubai, an indoor ski resort.

  • Global Village – A cultural and shopping festival featuring pavilions from different countries.

  • Desert Safari – A thrilling experience with dune bashing, camel rides, and Arabian-style entertainment.

  • Dubai Marina Dhow Cruise – A luxurious dinner cruise with stunning views of Dubai’s skyline.

  • Skydiving & Hot Air Ballooning – For adrenaline seekers, experiences over Palm Jumeirah or the desert.

  • Al Fahidi Historical District – Explore Dubai’s heritage with its museums and traditional wind-tower houses.

  • Dubai Museum – Located in Al Fahidi Fort, showcasing the city’s transformation.

  • Jumeirah Mosque – A beautiful Islamic architectural landmark open to non-Muslim visitors.

After a hearty breakfast, get ready for a magical journey into the Dubai Mall Aquarium & Underwater Zoo. Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and stress-free experience. Step into the spectacular underwater tunnel, where sharks, rays, and exotic fish glide gracefully around you, creating an awe-inspiring sight. Then, explore the Underwater Zoo, home to fascinating creatures like playful otters, massive crocodiles, and colourful amphibians. Wander through interactive exhibits, get up close with unique marine species, and learn about the wonders of the ocean in a fun and engaging way. Whether you're marvelling at the beauty of the deep sea or meeting incredible wildlife, this experience is perfect for all ages. After an unforgettable adventure, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, leaving you with mesmerizing memories of Dubai’s underwater world.

Get ready for an unforgettable experience as you soar to the 124th and 125th floors of the Burj Khalifa, the world’s tallest building! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey. With your entry ticket included, step into the high-speed elevator and feel the excitement as you ascend to breath-taking heights in seconds. Once at the top, step onto the observation deck and take in unmatched panoramic views of Dubai’s skyline, golden desert, and shimmering coastline. Whether you're capturing photos, gazing through the interactive telescopes, or simply soaking in the awe-inspiring scenery, this is a moment to cherish. After thisonce-in-a-lifetime experience, sit back and relaxas wedrop you back at your hotel.

As the sun sets over Dubai, get ready for a mesmerizing experience at the world-famous Fountain Show. Our friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up and ensure a seamless journey to this breathtaking spectacle. Watch in awe as water dances to rhythmic melodies, illuminated by dazzling lights, creating a magical display against the stunning city skyline. Feel the enchanting atmosphere as music, lights, and water come together in perfect harmony. After an unforgettable evening, our representative will ensure a comfortable drop-off at your hotel, leaving you with memories of Dubai’s most iconic performance.

Kick-start your day with a delicious breakfast, then gear up for an adrenaline-filled adventure at IMGWorlds of Adventure, Dubai’s largest indoor theme park. You will be picked up from your hotel by your Travelxploria representative and guide, guaranteeing a hassle-free and easy trip. Enter an exciting world filled with dinosaurs, Marvel superheroes, Cartoon Network characters, and exhilarating rides. Experience the exhilaration of riding a fast-paced roller coaster, The Velociraptor, or fighting villains with Spider-Man and the Avengers. The Park offers live entertainment, interactive experiences, and exciting attractions for families. IMG offers something for everyone, regardless of your preference for magical moments or exhilarating experiences. Enjoy a relaxing ride back to your hotel after a day full of activities.

After a delicious breakfast, get ready for an unforgettable adventure through the heart of Dubai! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and experienced guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable start to your day. With the best on-ground support staff, embark on a journey that showcases the perfect blend of tradition and modernity. Step into history at the Dubai Museum, where ancient artifacts and immersive exhibits bring the city’s past to life. Wander through the bustling Gold and Spice Souks, where vibrant colors and rich aromas create an unforgettable sensory experience. Drive along the stunning coastline, stopping for breathtaking views of the Burj Al Arab and the luxurious Palm Jumeirah. Explore the charming Al Fahidi Historical District, and end your tour at the awe-inspiring Dubai Frame, offering panoramic views of old and new Dubai. After a day filled with discovery, relax as we drop you back at your hotel. With Travelxploria, the best travel agency, every moment of your Dubai tour is designed for an extraordinary experience.

Start your day with a delightful breakfast before embarking on an exhilarating Desert Safari that promises adventure and cultural charm! Our friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up in a luxurious 4x4 land cruiser, ready to whisk you away into the golden dunes of Dubai. Feel the rush of dune bashing, sandboarding, and a camel ride, or take it up a notch with an optional quad biking adventure. As the sun paints the sky in fiery hues, unwind at a traditional Bedouin camp, where a sumptuous BBQ dinner awaits, paired with mesmerizing Belly Dance and Tanoura performances. End the night with a smooth hotel drop-off, taking home memories of an enchanting desert escape.

Step into a living masterpiece at Dubai Miracle Garden, the world’s largest natural flower garden, where over 150 million blooms create stunning floral displays. Your friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a seamless and comfortable journey. With your entry ticket included, wander through a magical landscape, where heart-shaped archways, whimsical castles, and a full-scale Emirates A380 covered in flowers bring nature and creativity to life. Stroll along vibrant pathways, breathe in the fragrant air, and snap unforgettable photos at every turn. From the floating flower lady to cozy gazebos draped in blossoms, every corner feels like a fairy-tale escape. Whether you're a nature lover, a photography enthusiast, or simply looking for a peaceful retreat, Miracle Garden is a sight to behold. After soaking in its beauty, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Get ready for an exciting evening at Global Village, the Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, making sure you have a smooth and stress-free journey. With your entry ticket included, step into a vibrant world of over 90 country pavilions, each filled with authentic crafts, flavours, and traditions. Wander through lively streets, watch dazzling performances, hop on thrilling rides, and taste mouth-watering dishes from around the globe. From shopping for unique souvenirs to enjoying live music and street entertainment, every moment is an adventure. As the night winds down, relax in comfort as we drop you back at your hotel.

Escape into a whimsical paradise at Dubai Butterfly Garden, where thousands of delicate, colorful butterflies flutter around in a lush, tropical setting. A Travelxploria representative and guidewill pick you up from your hotel, ensuring asmooth and hassle-free journey. With your entry ticket included, step into the beautifully designed domes, where butterflies dance through the air, resting gently on flowers—and maybe even on you! Stroll through vibrant gardens, learn about their fascinating life cycle, and enjoy the peaceful atmosphere. Whether you're a nature lover or just looking for a magical experience, this place is pure enchantment. After soaking in the beauty, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Get ready to experience Dubai Frame, a stunning landmark that perfectly showcases the city’s incredible journey from past to future! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable ride. With your entry ticket included, step inside this golden architectural marvel and explore an engaging museum, where Dubai’s fascinating transformation comes to life. Then, ride the elevator to the top, where a glass-floored sky bridge offers breath-taking 360-degree views—on one side, the historic charm of old Dubai, and on the other, the dazzling skyline of the modern city. Discover the luxury and excitement of Atlantis, The Palm, an iconic Dubai landmark offering world-class experiences. A Travelxploria representative will pick you up from your hotel for a smooth and comfortable journey to this majestic resort on Palm Jumeirah. Step into a world of elegance and adventure, where you can explore fine dining restaurants, luxurious lounges, and private beaches. Admire the stunning Arabian Gulf views, stroll through the lavish interiors, or unwind in a sophisticated setting. Whether you’re indulging in gourmet cuisine, experiencing thrilling water activities, or simply soaking in the extravagant ambiance, Atlantis promises a truly unforgettable experience. After an incredible time at this world-famous destination, relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Escape into a world of aquatic adventure at Aquaventure Waterpark, the crown jewel of Atlantis, The Palm! Your Travelxploria representative will ensure a smooth and hassle-free ride to this record-breaking waterpark. With your entry ticket included, get ready to brave the tallest waterslides, ride rushing rapids, and float through twisting rivers. Feel the rush on the Leap of Faith, where you’ll plunge down a near-vertical slide through a shark-filled lagoon. Experience the thrill of Poseidon's Revenge, challenge the Aquaconda, or simply unwind on the private beach. Whether you're a thrill-seeker or a beach lover, there's something for everyone. Enjoy endless splashes, exciting rides, and Dubai’s ultimate water adventure! After an unforgettable day, relax and enjoy a comfortable ride back to your hotel.

packages.overview:
• Burj Khalifa – The world’s tallest building, offering breathtaking city views from its observation decks.

  • Palm Jumeirah – A man-made island home to luxury resorts, including Atlantis, The Palm.

  • Burj Al Arab – The world-famous sail-shaped luxury hotel.

  • Dubai Frame – A unique structure providing panoramic views of old and new Dubai.

  • Dubai Mall – One of the largest malls in the world, featuring an indoor aquarium, ice rink, and luxury shopping.

  • Mall of the Emirates – Home to Ski Dubai, an indoor ski resort.

  • Global Village – A cultural and shopping festival featuring pavilions from different countries.

  • Desert Safari – A thrilling experience with dune bashing, camel rides, and Arabian-style entertainment.

  • Dubai Marina Dhow Cruise – A luxurious dinner cruise with stunning views of Dubai’s skyline.

  • Skydiving & Hot Air Ballooning – For adrenaline seekers, experiences over Palm Jumeirah or the desert.

Get ready for an unforgettable experience as you soar to the 124th and 125th floors of the Burj Khalifa, the world’s tallest building! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey. With your entry ticket included, step into the high-speed elevator and feel the excitement as you ascend to breath-taking heights in seconds. Once at the top, step onto the observation deck and take in unmatched panoramic views of Dubai’s skyline, golden desert, and shimmering coastline. Whether you're capturing photos, gazing through the interactive telescopes, or simply soaking in the awe-inspiring scenery, this is a moment to cherish. After thisonce-in-a-lifetime experience, sit back and relaxas wedrop you back at your hotel.

Afterwards, get ready for an exciting evening at Global Village, the Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, making sure you have a smooth and stress-free journey. With your entry ticket included, step into a vibrant world of over 90 country pavilions, each filled with authentic crafts, flavours, and traditions. Wander through lively streets, watch dazzling performances, hop on thrilling rides, and taste mouth-watering dishes from around the globe. From shopping for unique souvenirs to enjoying live music and street entertainment, every moment is an adventure. As the night winds down, relax in comfort as we drop you back at your hotel.

Escape into a winter paradise at Ski Dubai, where the magic of snow meets the heart of the desert. Your Travelxploria representative and expert guide will ensure a seamless experience as you step into this indoor winter wonderland. With the best on-ground support staff, glide down the powdery slopes, try your hand at snowboarding, or have fun in the Snow Park. Meet adorable penguins, build snowmen, or take a thrilling ride on the Mountain Thriller. Travelxploria, the best travel agency, guarantees an unforgettable adventure in this icy escape, making you forget you're in the middle of Dubai’s desert.

Afterwards embark on an exhilarating Desert Safari that promises adventure and cultural charm! Our friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up in a luxurious 4x4 land cruiser, ready to whisk you away into the golden dunes of Dubai. Feel the rush of dune bashing, sandboarding, and a camel ride, or take it up a notch with an optional quad biking adventure. As the sun paints the sky in fiery hues, unwind at a traditional Bedouin camp, where a sumptuous BBQ dinner awaits, paired with mesmerizing Belly Dance and Tanoura performances. End the night with a smooth hotel drop-off, taking home memories of an enchanting desert escape.

Escape into a world of aquatic adventure at Aquaventure Waterpark, the crown jewel of Atlantis, The Palm! Your Travelxploria representative will ensure a smooth and hassle-free ride to this record-breaking waterpark. With your entry ticket included, get ready to brave the tallest waterslides, ride rushing rapids, and float through twisting rivers. Feel the rush on the Leap of Faith, where you’ll plunge down a near-vertical slide through a shark-filled lagoon. Experience the thrill of Poseidon's Revenge, challenge the Aquaconda, or simply unwind on the private beach. Whether you're a thrill-seeker or a beach lover, there's something for everyone. Enjoy endless splashes, exciting rides, and Dubai’s ultimate water adventure! After an unforgettable day, relax and enjoy a comfortable ride back to your hotel.

Dive into a mesmerizing underwater world at The Lost Chambers Aquarium, where the myth of Atlantis comes to life, the Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey to this enchanting marine wonderland. With your entry ticket included, step into a world of mystical ruins and submerged tunnels, home to over 65,000 marine creatures. Watch majestic sharks, graceful stingrays, and colourful tropical fish swim past you in stunning glass tunnels. Explore interactive touch pools, learn about marine conservation, and witness fascinating feeding sessions as expert aquarists share insights into these incredible sea creatures. Whether you're a nature lover, a photography enthusiast, or just seeking a peaceful escape, The Lost Chambers offers a truly magical experience. After immersing yourself in this aquatic paradise, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

After a hearty breakfast, get ready for a magical journey into the Dubai Mall Aquarium & Underwater Zoo. Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and stress-free experience. Step into the spectacular underwater tunnel, where sharks, rays, and exotic fish glide gracefully around you, creating an awe-inspiring sight. Then, explore the Underwater Zoo, home to fascinating creatures like playful otters, massive crocodiles, and colourful amphibians. Wander through interactive exhibits, get up close with unique marine species, and learn about the wonders of the ocean in a fun and engaging way. Whether you're marvelling at the beauty of the deep sea or meeting incredible wildlife, this experience is perfect for all ages. After an unforgettable adventure, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, leaving you with mesmerizing memories of Dubai’s underwater world.

Step into a living masterpiece at Dubai Miracle Garden, the world’s largest natural flower garden, where over 150 million blooms create stunning floral displays. Your friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a seamless and comfortable journey. With your entry ticket included, wander through a magical landscape, where heart-shaped archways, whimsical castles, and a full-scale Emirates A380 covered in flowers bring nature and creativity to life. Stroll along vibrant pathways, breathe in the fragrant air, and snap unforgettable photos at every turn. From the floating flower lady to cozy gazebos draped in blossoms, every corner feels like a fairy-tale escape. Whether you're a nature lover, a photography enthusiast, or simply looking for a peaceful retreat, Miracle Garden is a sight to behold. After soaking in its beauty, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.


Escape into a whimsical paradise at Dubai Butterfly Garden, where thousands of delicate, colorful butterflies flutter around in a lush, tropical setting. A Travelxploria representative and guidewill pick you up from your hotel, ensuring asmooth and hassle-free journey. With your entry ticket included, step into the beautifully designed domes, where butterflies dance through the air, resting gently on flowers—and maybe even on you! Stroll through vibrant gardens, learn about their fascinating life cycle, and enjoy the peaceful atmosphere. Whether you're a nature lover or just looking for a magical experience, this place is pure enchantment. After soaking in the beauty, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

packages.overview:
Welcome to Travelxploria’s “Future & Folklore: The Dubai Fusion Tour”, where we invite you to experience a city that’s as ambitious as it is timeless. From the moment you touch down in this gleaming metropolis, our expert guides will whisk you away to the heights of the Burj Khalifa—where panoramic views stretch from the Arabian Gulf to the endless desert horizon. As the sun tilts westward, you’ll descend into the heart of the city’s heritage: wandering spice-scented souks, bargaining for treasures in ancient alleyways, and sipping sweet mint tea as the call to prayer drifts through the air.

On day two, trade skyscrapers for sand dunes with our private desert safari. Feel the thrill of dune bashing in a 4×4, pause for sunset photography against a backdrop of rolling ochre waves, and settle in under the stars at a Bedouin-style camp. Here, you’ll savor a traditional barbecue feast, watch live folk dances, and learn about Emirati culture straight from local hosts—all under the glow of lantern light.

Throughout your journey, Travelxploria’s commitment to seamless service means you travel in comfort and style. Whether you’re indulging in world-class shopping at the Dubai Mall, exploring Palm Jumeirah’s architectural marvels, or toasting to new horizons on a sunset dhow cruise, every moment is curated to leave you inspired. Let’s fly to your dream destination—and discover how Dubai’s dazzling future and rich traditions come together to create the adventure of a lifetime

After a delicious breakfast, get ready for an unforgettable adventure through the heart of Dubai! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and experienced guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable start to your day. With the best on-ground support staff, embark on a journey that showcases the perfect blend of tradition and modernity. Step into history at the Dubai Museum, where ancient artifacts and immersive exhibits bring the city’s past to life. Wander through the bustling Gold and Spice Souks, where vibrant colors and rich aromas create an unforgettable sensory experience. Drive along the stunning coastline, stopping for breathtaking views of the Burj Al Arab and the luxurious Palm Jumeirah. Explore the charming Al Fahidi Historical District, and end your tour at the awe-inspiring Dubai Frame, offering panoramic views of old and new Dubai. After a day filled with discovery, relax as we drop you back at your hotel. With Travelxploria, the best travel agency, every moment of your Dubai tour is designed for an extraordinary experience.

Get ready for an unforgettable experience as you soar to the 124th and 125th floors of the Burj Khalifa, the world’s tallest building! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey. With your entry ticket included, step into the high-speed elevator and feel the excitement as you ascend to breath-taking heights in seconds. Once at the top, step onto the observation deck and take in unmatched panoramic views of Dubai’s skyline, golden desert, and shimmering coastline. Whether you're capturing photos, gazing through the interactive telescopes, or simply soaking in the awe-inspiring scenery, this is a moment to cherish. After thisonce-in-a-lifetime experience, sit back and relaxas wedrop you back at your hotel.

Our friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up in a luxurious 4x4 land cruiser, ready to whisk you away into the golden dunes of Dubai. Feel the rush of dune bashing, sandboarding, and a camel ride, or take it up a notch with an optional quad biking adventure. packages.overview:
Discover Dubai with Travelxploria – Where Innovation Meets Tradition

Dubai is a city where innovation and heritage blend seamlessly, creating a destination like no other. With Travelxploria, explore a world where every towering skyscraper reflects ambition, and every quiet souk echoes with the richness of Arabian culture. From the glittering heights of the Burj Khalifa to the golden silence of the desert dunes, every corner of Dubai tells a story worth experiencing.

Marvel at futuristic architecture, indulge in world-class dining, and lose yourself in vibrant traditions that span centuries. Shop in ultra-modern malls by day, then wander spice-scented alleys by evening. Cruise the Dubai Marina at sunset, dine under the stars in a Bedouin-style camp, and wake to breathtaking sunrises over the Arabian Gulf.

At Travelxploria, we believe travel should be more than sightseeing—it should be storytelling. And in Dubai, the story is one of vision, culture, and unforgettable wonder.
Let’s fly to your dream destination—and let Dubai leave you inspired.

After a delicious breakfast, get ready for an unforgettable adventure through the heart of Dubai! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and experienced guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable start to your day. With the best on-ground support staff, embark on a journey that showcases the perfect blend of tradition and modernity. Step into history at the Dubai Museum, where ancient artifacts and immersive exhibits bring the city’s past to life. Wander through the bustling Gold and Spice Souks, where vibrant colors and rich aromas create an unforgettable sensory experience. Drive along the stunning coastline, stopping for breathtaking views of the Burj Al Arab and the luxurious Palm Jumeirah. Explore the charming Al Fahidi Historical District, and end your tour at the awe-inspiring Dubai Frame, offering panoramic views of old and new Dubai. After a day filled with discovery, relax as we drop you back at your hotel. With Travelxploria, the best travel agency, every moment of your Dubai tour is designed for an extraordinary experience.

Get ready for an unforgettable experience as you soar to the 124th and 125th floors of the Burj Khalifa, the world’s tallest building! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey. With your entry ticket included, step into the high-speed elevator and feel the excitement as you ascend to breath-taking heights in seconds. Once at the top, step onto the observation deck and take in unmatched panoramic views of Dubai’s skyline, golden desert, and shimmering coastline. Whether you're capturing photos, gazing through the interactive telescopes, or simply soaking in the awe-inspiring scenery, this is a moment to cherish. After thisonce-in-a-lifetime experience, sit back and relaxas wedrop you back at your hotel.

After a hearty breakfast, get ready for a magical journey into the Dubai Mall Aquarium & Underwater Zoo. Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and stress-free experience. Step into the spectacular underwater tunnel, where sharks, rays, and exotic fish glide gracefully around you, creating an awe-inspiring sight. Then, explore the Underwater Zoo, home to fascinating creatures like playful otters, massive crocodiles, and colourful amphibians. Wander through interactive exhibits, get up close with unique marine species, and learn about the wonders of the ocean in a fun and engaging way. Whether you're marvelling at the beauty of the deep sea or meeting incredible wildlife, this experience is perfect for all ages. After an unforgettable adventure, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, leaving you with mesmerizing memories of Dubai’s underwater world.

As the sun sets over Dubai, get ready for a mesmerizing experience at the world-famous Fountain Show. Our friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up and ensure a seamless journey to this breathtaking spectacle. Watch in awe as water dances to rhythmic melodies, illuminated by dazzling lights, creating a magical display against the stunning city skyline. Feel the enchanting atmosphere as music, lights, and water come together in perfect harmony. After an unforgettable evening, our representative will ensure a comfortable drop-off at your hotel, leaving you with memories of Dubai’s most iconic performance.

After a delicious breakfast, step into the future with an awe-inspiring visit to the Museum of the Future, Dubai’s architectural and technological marvel! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a seamless experience. With your admission ticket included, enter a world of cutting-edge innovation, space exploration, AI-driven exhibits, and futuristic concepts that redefine what’s possible. Walk through immersive displays that transport you to the year 2071, where technology, sustainability, and human potential come to life. Explore interactive exhibits on robotics, health, and smart cities, offering a glimpse into tomorrow’s world. Whether you’re fascinated by artificial intelligence or dreaming of space travel, this experience will ignite your imagination. After an enlightening journey through the future, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Later embark on an exhilarating Desert Safari that promises adventure and cultural charm! Our friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up in a luxurious 4x4 land cruiser, ready to whisk you away into the golden dunes of Dubai. Feel the rush of dune bashing, sandboarding, and a camel ride, or take it up a notch with an optional quad biking adventure. As the sun paints the sky in fiery hues, unwind at a traditional Bedouin camp, where a sumptuous BBQ dinner awaits, paired with mesmerizing Belly Dance and Tanoura performances. End the night with a smooth hotel drop-off, taking home memories of an enchanting desert escape.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"View at the Palm Observatory with Miracle Garden","day_summary":"

Get ready for an awe-inspiring experience at The View at The Palm Observatory, where you’ll take in some of the most breathtaking views in Dubai! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, making sure your journey is smooth and hassle-free. With your entry ticket included, step into a high-speed elevator that whisks you up to the 52nd floor, where an incredible 360-degree observation deck awaits. From here, gaze out at the stunning Palm Jumeirah, Dubai Marina, and the dazzling city skyline stretching as far as the eye can see. Take your time, snap amazing photos, and simply soak in the moment. Whether you’re a photography lover or just want to admire Dubai from above, this is an experience you won’t forget. Once you’ve had your fill of the views, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.


Step into a living masterpiece at Dubai Miracle Garden, the world’s largest natural flower garden, where over 150 million blooms create stunning floral displays. Your friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a seamless and comfortable journey. With your entry ticket included, wander through a magical landscape, where heart-shaped archways, whimsical castles, and a full-scale Emirates A380 covered in flowers bring nature and creativity to life. Stroll along vibrant pathways, breathe in the fragrant air, and snap unforgettable photos at every turn. From the floating flower lady to cozy gazebos draped in blossoms, every corner feels like a fairy-tale escape. Whether you're a nature lover, a photography enthusiast, or simply looking for a peaceful retreat, Miracle Garden is a sight to behold. After soaking in its beauty, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

packages.package_name: Arabian Allure: From Dunes to Downtown
packages.overview:
Discover Dazzling Dubai with Travelxploria – Where Innovation Meets Heritage

Dubai, a shimmering jewel of the UAE, is a city where the future rises from the desert sands, and tradition lives in harmony with modern marvels. With Travelxploria, step into a destination that redefines luxury, ambition, and cultural richness.

Marvel at architectural icons like the Burj Khalifa, the tallest building in the world, and Palm Jumeirah, a man-made island shaped like a palm tree, visible from space. Stroll through the world-famous Dubai Mall, where over 1,200 stores, a stunning aquarium, and even an Olympic-sized ice rink offer endless entertainment.

Unwind along the elegant waterfront of Dubai Marina, lined with luxury yachts, chic cafes, and glittering high-rises. Whether you're shopping for global fashion, dining under the stars, or simply soaking in the city’s opulence, Dubai offers experiences that are as bold as they are unforgettable.

With Travelxploria, every moment in Dubai is seamlessly curated—because this isn’t just a destination, it’s where dreams meet design.
Let’s fly to your dream destination—Dubai awaits.

As you land at Dubai International Airport, the gateway to a world of luxury and adventure, our dedicated representative from Travelxploria will be there to warmly welcome you. From the moment you arrive, enjoy a seamless transfer to your hotel, soaking in the breathtaking skyline along the way. Settle into your elegant accommodation and take a moment to unwind. Whether you choose to explore the vibrant streets or relax, Dubai’s charm awaits you.

Afterwards get ready for an unforgettable adventure through the heart of Dubai! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and experienced guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable start to your day. Get ready for an awe-inspiring experience at The View at The Palm Observatory, where you’ll take in some of the most breathtaking views in Dubai! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, making sure your journey is smooth and hassle-free. With your entry ticket included, step into a high-speed elevator that whisks you up to the 52nd floor, where an incredible 360-degree observation deck awaits. Take your time, snap amazing photos, and simply soak in the moment. Whether you’re a photography lover or just want to admire Dubai from above, this is an experience you won’t forget. Once you’ve had your fill of the views, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

After a hearty breakfast, get ready for a magical journey into the Dubai Mall Aquarium & Underwater Zoo. Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and stress-free experience. Step into the spectacular underwater tunnel, where sharks, rays, and exotic fish glide gracefully around you, creating an awe-inspiring sight. Then, explore the Underwater Zoo, home to fascinating creatures like playful otters, massive crocodiles, and colourful amphibians. Wander through interactive exhibits, get up close with unique marine species, and learn about the wonders of the ocean in a fun and engaging way. Whether you're marvelling at the beauty of the deep sea or meeting incredible wildlife, this experience is perfect for all ages. After an unforgettable adventure, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, leaving you with mesmerizing memories of Dubai’s underwater world.

Get ready to embark on an exhilarating Desert Safari that promises adventure and cultural charm! Our friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up in a luxurious 4x4 land cruiser, ready to whisk you away into the golden dunes of Dubai. Feel the rush of dune bashing, sandboarding, and a camel ride, or take it up a notch with an optional quad biking adventure. As the sun paints the sky in fiery hues, unwind at a traditional Bedouin camp, where a sumptuous BBQ dinner awaits, paired with mesmerizing Belly Dance and Tanoura performances. End the night with a smooth hotel drop-off, taking home memories of an enchanting desert escape.

Step into a living masterpiece at Dubai Miracle Garden, the world’s largest natural flower garden, where over 150 million blooms create stunning floral displays. Your friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a seamless and comfortable journey. With your entry ticket included, wander through a magical landscape, where heart-shaped archways, whimsical castles, and a full-scale Emirates A380 covered in flowers bring nature and creativity to life. Stroll along vibrant pathways, breathe in the fragrant air, and snap unforgettable photos at every turn. From the floating flower lady to cozy gazebos draped in blossoms, every corner feels like a fairy-tale escape. Whether you're a nature lover, a photography enthusiast, or simply looking for a peaceful retreat, Miracle Garden is a sight to behold. After soaking in its beauty, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

packages.overview:
Dubai, a dazzling jewel of the UAE, offers a one-of-a-kind adventure where futuristic ambition meets timeless tradition. With Travelxploria, embark on a journey to a city where the sky is the limit and the golden sands below whisper stories of ancient cultures.

From the Burj Khalifa, the world’s tallest tower, to the sprawling Palm Jumeirah, a marvel crafted from the sea, Dubai redefines modern architecture. Stroll through the luxurious Dubai Mall, shop for treasures in bustling souks, or indulge in world-class dining with views that stretch across the desert. Every corner of the city tells a tale of innovation and heritage.

As the sun sets, sail the serene waters of the Dubai Marina, or take a thrilling desert safari across the golden dunes—an adventure that brings together the city’s vibrant energy and tranquil beauty. Whether you’re enjoying the elegance of the city’s skyscrapers or the warmth of its desert, Dubai offers a playground of endless wonder, adventure, and luxury.

At Travelxploria, we curate experiences that blend culture, comfort, and excitement, ensuring your Dubai adventure is unforgettable. Let’s fly to your dream destination—where the future and tradition collide in dazzling Dubai.

After a delicious breakfast, get ready for an unforgettable adventure through the heart of Dubai! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and experienced guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable start to your day. With the best on-ground support staff, embark on a journey that showcases the perfect blend of tradition and modernity. Step into history at the Dubai Museum, where ancient artifacts and immersive exhibits bring the city’s past to life. Wander through the bustling Gold and Spice Souks, where vibrant colors and rich aromas create an unforgettable sensory experience. Drive along the stunning coastline, stopping for breathtaking views of the Burj Al Arab and the luxurious Palm Jumeirah. Explore the charming Al Fahidi Historical District, and end your tour at the awe-inspiring Dubai Frame, offering panoramic views of old and new Dubai. After a day filled with discovery, relax as we drop you back at your hotel. With Travelxploria, the best travel agency, every moment of your Dubai tour is designed for an extraordinary experience.

Get ready for an awe-inspiring experience at The View at The Palm Observatory, where you’ll take in some of the most breathtaking views in Dubai! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, making sure your journey is smooth and hassle-free. With your entry ticket included, step into a high-speed elevator that whisks you up to the 52nd floor, where an incredible 360-degree observation deck awaits. From here, gaze out at the stunning Palm Jumeirah, Dubai Marina, and the dazzling city skyline stretching as far as the eye can see. Take your time, snap amazing photos, and simply soak in the moment. Whether you’re a photography lover or just want to admire Dubai from above, this is an experience you won’t forget. Once you’ve had your fill of the views, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Get ready to experience Dubai Frame, a stunning landmark that perfectly showcases the city’s incredible journey from past to future! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable ride. With your entry ticket included, step inside this golden architectural marvel and explore an engaging museum, where Dubai’s fascinating transformation comes to life. Then, ride the elevator to the top, where a glass-floored sky bridge offers breath-taking 360-degree views—on one side, the historic charm of old Dubai, and on the other, the dazzling skyline of the modern city. Walk across, take in the views, and capture incredible photos of this unique contrast. Whether you're drawn to history or simply love breath-taking sights, this experience is truly special. After your visit, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Get ready for a magical evening. Our friendly representative from Travelxploria will guide you to the stunning Dhow Cruise where you will glide along the sparkling waters of Dubai Marina, enjoying breathtaking skyline views, a delicious dinner, and live entertainment. It’s the perfect way to experience Dubai’s charm. Once the evening falls, we’ll drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and relaxing overnight stay in your accommodation.

Get ready to experience Dubai Frame, a stunning landmark that perfectly showcases the city’s incredible journey from past to future! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable ride. With your entry ticket included, step inside this golden architectural marvel and explore an engaging museum, where Dubai’s fascinating transformation comes to life. Then, ride the elevator to the top, where a glass-floored sky bridge offers breath-taking 360-degree views—on one side, the historic charm of old Dubai, and on the other, the dazzling skyline of the modern city. Walk across, take in the views, and capture incredible photos of this unique contrast. Whether you're drawn to history or simply love breath-taking sights, this experience is truly special. After your visit, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Get ready for an unforgettable experience as you soar to the 124th and 125th floors of the Burj Khalifa, the world’s tallest building! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey. With your entry ticket included, step into the high-speed elevator and feel the excitement as you ascend to breath-taking heights in seconds. Once at the top, step onto the observation deck and take in unmatched panoramic views of Dubai’s skyline, golden desert, and shimmering coastline. Whether you're capturing photos, gazing through the interactive telescopes, or simply soaking in the awe-inspiring scenery, this is a moment to cherish. After thisonce-in-a-lifetime experience, sit back and relaxas wedrop you back at your hotel.

Get ready for a magical journey into the Dubai Mall Aquarium & Underwater Zoo. Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide ensuring a smooth and stress-free experience. Step into the spectacular underwater tunnel, where sharks, rays, and exotic fish glide gracefully around you, creating an awe-inspiring sight. Then, explore the Underwater Zoo, home to fascinating creatures like playful otters, massive crocodiles, and colourful amphibians. Wander through interactive exhibits, get up close with unique marine species, and learn about the wonders of the ocean in a fun and engaging way. Whether you're marvelling at the beauty of the deep sea or meeting incredible wildlife, this experience is perfect for all ages. After an unforgettable adventure, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, leaving you with mesmerizing memories of Dubai’s underwater world.

Get ready to elevate your Dubai experience with a visit to Sky Glass Dubai, an architectural marvel offering breathtaking panoramic views of the city's futuristic skyline. Your Travelxploria representative will ensure a seamless journey, making sure you enjoy every moment of this exhilarating attraction. Walk across the transparent glass floor, feeling the thrill of floating above the city, while taking in unmatched views of Dubai’s iconic landmarks.

After a delicious breakfast, get ready for an exciting evening at Global Village, the Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, making sure you have a smooth and stress-free journey. With your entry ticket included, step into a vibrant world of over 90 country pavilions, each filled with authentic crafts, flavours, and traditions. Wander through lively streets, watch dazzling performances, hop on thrilling rides, and taste mouth-watering dishes from around the globe. From shopping for unique souvenirs to enjoying live music and street entertainment, every moment is an adventure. As the night winds down, relax in comfort as we drop you back at your hotel.

Step into a living masterpiece at Dubai Miracle Garden, the world’s largest natural flower garden, where over 150 million blooms create stunning floral displays. Your friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a seamless and comfortable journey. With your entry ticket included, wander through a magical landscape, where heart-shaped archways, whimsical castles, and a full-scale Emirates A380 covered in flowers bring nature and creativity to life. Stroll along vibrant pathways, breathe in the fragrant air, and snap unforgettable photos at every turn. From the floating flower lady to cozy gazebos draped in blossoms, every corner feels like a fairy-tale escape. Whether you're a nature lover, a photography enthusiast, or simply looking for a peaceful retreat, Miracle Garden is a sight to behold. After soaking in its beauty, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Start your day with a delightful breakfast before embarking on an exhilarating Desert Safari that promises adventure and cultural charm! Our friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up in a luxurious 4x4 land cruiser, ready to whisk you away into the golden dunes of Dubai. Feel the rush of dune bashing, sandboarding, and a camel ride, or take it up a notch with an optional quad biking adventure. As the sun paints the sky in fiery hues, unwind at a traditional Bedouin camp, where a sumptuous BBQ dinner awaits, paired with mesmerizing Belly Dance and Tanoura performances. End the night with a smooth hotel drop-off, taking home memories of an enchanting desert escape.

packages.overview:
• Dubai City Tour – Explore iconic landmarks like the Burj Khalifa, Dubai Mall, Palm Jumeirah, and Al Fahidi Historical District.

  • Desert Safari Adventure – Experience thrilling dune bashing, camel rides, and a BBQ dinner with entertainment under the stars.

  • Luxury & Leisure – Enjoy a Marina Dhow Cruise with dinner, indulge in shopping, or relax on Dubai’s stunning beaches.

  • Abu Dhabi Excursion – Visit the magnificent Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque, Emirates Palace, and explore Ferrari World for adventure.

As you land at Dubai International Airport, a world of luxury and adventure awaits. Our dedicated Travelxploria representative will warmly welcome you and ensure a seamless transfer to your hotel. As you drive past the city's iconic skyline, marvel at the futuristic architecture and vibrant energy of Dubai. Upon arrival at your hotel, check-in and unwind in comfort, soaking in the excitement of the journey ahead.

Experience Dubai in ultimate style with a luxurious limousine tour, tailored to your preferred timing, be it a daytime city cruise or a glamorous night ride. Your Travelxploria representative and guide will ensure a smooth experience, with a pick-up from your hotel in a high end limousine, setting the tone for an extravagant journey. Get ready to experience Dubai Frame, a stunning landmark that perfectly showcases the city’s incredible journey from past to future! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable ride. With your entry ticket included, step inside this golden architectural marvel and explore an engaging museum, where Dubai’s fascinating transformation comes to life. Then, ride the elevator to the top, where a glass-floored sky bridge offers breath-taking 360-degree views—on one side, the historic charm of old Dubai, and on the other, the dazzling skyline of the modern city. Walk across, take in the views, and capture incredible photos of this unique contrast. Whether you're drawn to history or simply love breath-taking sights, this experience is truly special. After your visit, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

After a delicious breakfast, get ready for an unforgettable adventure through the heart of Dubai! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and experienced guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable start to your day. With the best on-ground support staff, embark on a journey that showcases the perfect blend of tradition and modernity. Step into history at the Dubai Museum, where ancient artifacts and immersive exhibits bring the city’s past to life. Wander through the bustling Gold and Spice Souks, where vibrant colors and rich aromas create an unforgettable sensory experience. Drive along the stunning coastline, stopping for breathtaking views of the Burj Al Arab and the luxurious Palm Jumeirah. Explore the charming Al Fahidi Historical District, and end your tour at the awe-inspiring Dubai Frame, offering panoramic views of old and new Dubai. After a day filled with discovery, relax as we drop you back at your hotel. With Travelxploria, the best travel agency, every moment of your Dubai tour is designed for an extraordinary experience.

Get ready for an unforgettable experience as you soar to the 124th and 125th floors of the Burj Khalifa, the world’s tallest building! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey. With your entry ticket included, step into the high-speed elevator and feel the excitement as you ascend to breath-taking heights in seconds. Once at the top, step onto the observation deck and take in unmatched panoramic views of Dubai’s skyline, golden desert, and shimmering coastline. Whether you're capturing photos, gazing through the interactive telescopes, or simply soaking in the awe-inspiring scenery, this is a moment to cherish. After thisonce-in-a-lifetime experience, sit back and relaxas wedrop you back at your hotel.

Start your day with a delightful breakfast before embarking on an exhilarating Desert Safari that promises adventure and cultural charm! Our friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up in a luxurious 4x4 land cruiser, ready to whisk you away into the golden dunes of Dubai. Feel the rush of dune bashing, sandboarding, and a camel ride, or take it up a notch with an optional quad biking adventure. As the sun paints the sky in fiery hues, unwind at a traditional Bedouin camp, where a sumptuous BBQ dinner awaits, paired with mesmerizing Belly Dance and Tanoura performances. End the night with a smooth hotel drop-off, taking home memories of an enchanting desert escape.

Get ready for an awe-inspiring experience at The View at The Palm Observatory, where you’ll take in some of the most breathtaking views in Dubai! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, making sure your journey is smooth and hassle-free. With your entry ticket included, step into a high-speed elevator that whisks you up to the 52nd floor, where an incredible 360-degree observation deck awaits. From here, gaze out at the stunning Palm Jumeirah, Dubai Marina, and the dazzling city skyline stretching as far as the eye can see. Take your time, snap amazing photos, and simply soak in the moment. Whether you’re a photography lover or just want to admire Dubai from above, this is an experience you won’t forget. Once you’ve had your fill of the views, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Whether you want a sunrise getaway, a midday adventure, or a breathtaking sunset cruise, set sail on a luxurious yacht at the preference of the guest. After picking you up from your hotel, your Travelxploria representative will make the easy transition to the marina, where your private or shared yacht is waiting for you. Pass famous sites like the Burj Al Arab, Atlantis the Palm, and the stunning Dubai Marina skyline as you glide across the Arabian Gulf's glittering waters. Savour cool beverages, unwind on the sun deck, and take in the expansive views of the coast. This yacht experience offers luxury activities, whether you're looking for a romantic retreat, a fun family outing, or a wild celebration you can enjoy all. We'll make sure you have a comfortable ride back to your hotel.

World","day_summary":"

Explore the wonders of Abu Dhabi, a city where tradition meets modern luxury, on an unforgettable tour! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a seamless and comfortable journey. Start your adventure at the majestic Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque, where shimmering chandeliers, intricate carvings, and gleaming white domes create a sight to behold. Then, enjoy a scenic drive along the Corniche, soaking in breath-taking coastal views. Step into the past at the Heritage Village, where you’ll discover the UAE’s deep-rooted traditions. Admire the opulence of Emirates Palace, snap photos of the striking Etihad Towers, and visit the regal Qasr Al Watan, a palace showcasing the country’s rich heritage. If time permits, browse a local market for souvenirs. After an incredible day of exploration, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Step into a world of fantasy, adventure, and nostalgia at Warner Bros. World™ Abu Dhabi, the world’s largest indoor theme park, where your favorite characters come to life! Your Travelxploria representative will pick you up from your hotel for a comfortable drive to Yas Island, where an action-packed day awaits. With your entry ticket included, explore six immersive lands, from the bustling streets of Gotham City and Metropolis to the whimsical world of Cartoon Junction and Bedrock. Meet Batman, Superman, Bugs Bunny, and Scooby-Doo, enjoy thrilling rides, and step into live entertainment shows filled with movie magic. Feel the adrenaline on high-speed roller coasters, explore interactive attractions, and relive childhood memories with beloved Warner Bros. characters. Whether you're a superhero fan or a cartoon lover, there’s something for everyone! After a fun-filled adventure, relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Buckle up for an unforgettable adventure at Ferrari World Abu Dhabi, the ultimate destination for thrill-seekers and car enthusiasts! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel for a scenic drive to Yas Island, where excitement awaits. With your entry ticket included, step into a world inspired by the legendary Ferrari brand. Feel the rush of speed on Formula Rossa, the world’s fastest roller coaster, or conquer the daring heights of Flying Aces. Dive into interactive experiences, race in cutting-edge simulators, and explore Ferrari’s rich history through engaging exhibits. Families can enjoy a variety of kid-friendly rides, live performances, and fun-filled attractions. Whether you're a motorsport enthusiast or just looking for an electrifying experience, Ferrari World delivers non-stop thrills. After a high-energy day, sit back and enjoy a smooth ride back to your hotel.

packages.package_name: Glimmering Dubai: Where the Future Meets the Past
packages.overview: Explore Dubai with Travelxploria: Step into a land of contrasts where sun-baked dunes meet steel-and-glass marvels, and every moment feels like a new discovery. Begin your day with a golden desert safari—dune bashing, camel rides, and Bedouin hospitality—before soaring to the top of the Burj Khalifa for panoramic city views. Wander the winding alleys of the spice and gold souks, then witness futuristic feats like the Palm Jumeirah and Dubai Frame. As evening falls, glide along the Dubai Creek on a traditional dhow cruise or toast the skyline from a rooftop lounge. With Travelxploria, you’ll indulge in world-class cuisine, seamless luxury, and insider experiences that make Dubai not just a destination, but the adventure of a lifetime.

After a delicious breakfast, get ready for an unforgettable adventure through the heart of Dubai! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and experienced guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable start to your day. With the best on-ground support staff, embark on a journey that showcases the perfect blend of tradition and modernity. Step into history at the Dubai Museum, where ancient artifacts and immersive exhibits bring the city’s past to life. Wander through the bustling Gold and Spice Souks, where vibrant colors and rich aromas create an unforgettable sensory experience. Drive along the stunning coastline, stopping for breathtaking views of the Burj Al Arab and the luxurious Palm Jumeirah. Explore the charming Al Fahidi Historical District, and end your tour at the awe-inspiring Dubai Frame, offering panoramic views of old and new Dubai. After a day filled with discovery, relax as we drop you back at your hotel. With Travelxploria, the best travel agency, every moment of your Dubai tour is designed for an extraordinary experience.

Our friendly representative from Travelxploria will pick you up and guide you to the stunning Dhow Cruise where you will glide along the sparkling waters of Dubai Marina, enjoying breathtaking skyline views, a delicious dinner, and live entertainment. It’s the perfect way to experience Dubai’s charm. Once the evening falls, we’ll drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and relaxing overnight stay in your accommodation.

Get ready for an unforgettable experience as you soar to the 124th and 125th floors of the Burj Khalifa, the world’s tallest building! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey. With your entry ticket included, step into the high-speed elevator and feel the excitement as you ascend to breath-taking heights in seconds. Once at the top, step onto the observation deck and take in unmatched panoramic views of Dubai’s skyline, golden desert, and shimmering coastline. Whether you're capturing photos, gazing through the interactive telescopes, or simply soaking in the awe-inspiring scenery, this is a moment to cherish. After thisonce-in-a-lifetime experience, sit back and relaxas wedrop you back at your hotel.

After a delicious breakfast, step into the future with an awe-inspiring visit to the Museum of the Future, Dubai’s architectural and technological marvel! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a seamless experience. With your admission ticket included, enter a world of cutting-edge innovation, space exploration, AI-driven exhibits, and futuristic concepts that redefine what’s possible. Walk through immersive displays that transport you to the year 2071, where technology, sustainability, and human potential come to life. Explore interactive exhibits on robotics, health, and smart cities, offering a glimpse into tomorrow’s world. Whether you’re fascinated by artificial intelligence or dreaming of space travel, this experience will ignite your imagination. After an enlightening journey through the future, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Prepare for a exciting journey into the AYA Universe, Dubai’s most futuristic and immersive experience! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable ride. With your admission ticket included, step into a glowing world of light, sound, and interactive technology, where reality blurs into a digital dreamscape. Wander through 12 immersive zones, each transporting you to otherworldly realms filled with celestial beauty, floating rivers, and cosmic landscapes. Witness stunning AI-powered visuals, dance with digital projections, and feel like you’ve entered a parallel universe. This one-of-a-kind experience is perfect for those who love art, technology, and the unknown. Whether you’re exploring solo or with loved ones, every moment in AYA Universe is unforgettable. After this surreal adventure, relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Get ready to experience Dubai Frame, a stunning landmark that perfectly showcases the city’s incredible journey from past to future! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable ride. With your entry ticket included, step inside this golden architectural marvel and explore an engaging museum, where Dubai’s fascinating transformation comes to life. Then, ride the elevator to the top, where a glass-floored sky bridge offers breath-taking 360-degree views—on one side, the historic charm of old Dubai, and on the other, the dazzling skyline of the modern city. Walk across, take in the views, and capture incredible photos of this unique contrast. Whether you're drawn to history or simply love breath-taking sights, this experience is truly special. After your visit, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Explore the wonders of Abu Dhabi, a city where tradition meets modern luxury, on an unforgettable tour! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a seamless and comfortable journey. Start your adventure at the majestic Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque, where shimmering chandeliers, intricate carvings, and gleaming white domes create a sight to behold. Then, enjoy a scenic drive along the Corniche, soaking in breath-taking coastal views. Step into the past at the Heritage Village, where you’ll discover the UAE’s deep-rooted traditions. Admire the opulence of Emirates Palace, snap photos of the striking Etihad Towers, and visit the regal Qasr Al Watan, a palace showcasing the country’s rich heritage. If time permits, browse a local market for souvenirs. After an incredible day of exploration, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Buckle up for an unforgettable adventure at Ferrari World Abu Dhabi, the ultimate destination for thrill-seekers and car enthusiasts! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel for a scenic drive to Yas Island, where excitement awaits. With your entry ticket included, step into a world inspired by the legendary Ferrari brand. Feel the rush of speed on Formula Rossa, the world’s fastest roller coaster, or conquer the daring heights of Flying Aces. Dive into interactive experiences, race in cutting-edge simulators, and explore Ferrari’s rich history through engaging exhibits. Families can enjoy a variety of kid-friendly rides, live performances, and fun-filled attractions. Whether you're a motorsport enthusiast or just looking for an electrifying experience, Ferrari World delivers non-stop thrills. After a high-energy day, sit back and enjoy a smooth ride back to your hotel.

After a high-energy day, sit back and enjoy a smooth ride back to your hotel.

Emirates/Dubai/1740928497623-1740768484615-AdobeStock_245665968-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Visit to the Atlantis Aquaventure & Lost Chambers","day_summary":"

Escape into a world of aquatic adventure at Aquaventure Waterpark, the crown jewel of Atlantis, The Palm! Your Travelxploria representative will ensure a smooth and hassle-free ride to this record-breaking waterpark. With your entry ticket included, get ready to brave the tallest waterslides, ride rushing rapids, and float through twisting rivers. Feel the rush on the Leap of Faith, where you’ll plunge down a near-vertical slide through a shark-filled lagoon. Experience the thrill of Poseidon's Revenge, challenge the Aquaconda, or simply unwind on the private beach. Whether you're a thrill-seeker or a beach lover, there's something for everyone. Enjoy endless splashes, exciting rides, and Dubai’s ultimate water adventure! After an unforgettable day, relax and enjoy a comfortable ride back to your hotel.

Dive into a mesmerizing underwater world at The Lost Chambers Aquarium, where the myth of Atlantis comes to life, the Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey to this enchanting marine wonderland. With your entry ticket included, step into a world of mystical ruins and submerged tunnels, home to over 65,000 marine creatures. Watch majestic sharks, graceful stingrays, and colourful tropical fish swim past you in stunning glass tunnels. Explore interactive touch pools, learn about marine conservation, and witness fascinating feeding sessions as expert aquarists share insights into these incredible sea creatures. Whether you're a nature lover, a photography enthusiast, or just seeking a peaceful escape, The Lost Chambers offers a truly magical experience. After immersing yourself in this aquatic paradise, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Step into a living masterpiece at Dubai Miracle Garden, the world’s largest natural flower garden, where over 150 million blooms create stunning floral displays. Your friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a seamless and comfortable journey. With your entry ticket included, wander through a magical landscape, where heart-shaped archways, whimsical castles, and a full-scale Emirates A380 covered in flowers bring nature and creativity to life. Stroll along vibrant pathways, breathe in the fragrant air, and snap unforgettable photos at every turn. From the floating flower lady to cozy gazebos draped in blossoms, every corner feels like a fairy-tale escape. Whether you're a nature lover, a photography enthusiast, or simply looking for a peaceful retreat, Miracle Garden is a sight to behold. After soaking in its beauty, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Afterwards, get ready for an exciting evening at Global Village, the Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, making sure you have a smooth and stress-free journey. With your entry ticket included, step into a vibrant world of over 90 country pavilions, each filled with authentic crafts, flavours, and traditions. Wander through lively streets, watch dazzling performances, hop on thrilling rides, and taste mouth-watering dishes from around the globe. From shopping for unique souvenirs to enjoying live music and street entertainment, every moment is an adventure. As the night winds down, relax in comfort as we drop you back at your hotel.

packages.overview: Dubai and Abu Dhabi, the crown jewels of the UAE, blend modern innovation with rich heritage. Dubai mesmerizes with its towering skyscrapers, luxury shopping, and thrilling adventures, while Abu Dhabi captivates with its cultural landmarks, pristine beaches, and architectural wonders. From bustling souks to futuristic attractions, these cities offer a perfect mix of opulence and tradition. Whether you're exploring the golden dunes, indulging in world-class dining, or marveling at iconic landmarks, Dubai and Abu Dhabi promise an unforgettable journey filled with wonder and elegance.

After a delicious breakfast, get ready for an unforgettable adventure through the heart of Dubai! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and experienced guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable start to your day. With the best on-ground support staff, embark on a journey that showcases the perfect blend of tradition and modernity. Step into history at the Dubai Museum, where ancient artifacts and immersive exhibits bring the city’s past to life. Wander through the bustling Gold and Spice Souks, where vibrant colors and rich aromas create an unforgettable sensory experience. Drive along the stunning coastline, stopping for breathtaking views of the Burj Al Arab and the luxurious Palm Jumeirah. Explore the charming Al Fahidi Historical District, and end your tour at the awe-inspiring Dubai Frame, offering panoramic views of old and new Dubai. After a day filled with discovery, relax as we drop you back at your hotel. With Travelxploria, the best travel agency, every moment of your Dubai tour is designed for an extraordinary experience.

Get ready for an unforgettable experience as you soar to the 124th and 125th floors of the Burj Khalifa, the world’s tallest building! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey. With your entry ticket included, step into the high-speed elevator and feel the excitement as you ascend to breath-taking heights in seconds. Once at the top, step onto the observation deck and take in unmatched panoramic views of Dubai’s skyline, golden desert, and shimmering coastline. Whether you're capturing photos, gazing through the interactive telescopes, or simply soaking in the awe-inspiring scenery, this is a moment to cherish. After thisonce-in-a-lifetime experience, sit back and relaxas wedrop you back at your hotel.

After a hearty breakfast, get ready for a magical journey into the Dubai Mall Aquarium & Underwater Zoo. Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and stress-free experience. Step into the spectacular underwater tunnel, where sharks, rays, and exotic fish glide gracefully around you, creating an awe-inspiring sight. Then, explore the Underwater Zoo, home to fascinating creatures like playful otters, massive crocodiles, and colourful amphibians. Wander through interactive exhibits, get up close with unique marine species, and learn about the wonders of the ocean in a fun and engaging way. Whether you're marvelling at the beauty of the deep sea or meeting incredible wildlife, this experience is perfect for all ages. After an unforgettable adventure, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, leaving you with mesmerizing memories of Dubai’s underwater world.

After a hearty breakfast, get ready for a magical journey into the Dubai Mall Aquarium & Underwater Zoo. Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and stress-free experience. Step into the spectacular underwater tunnel, where sharks, rays, and exotic fish glide gracefully around you, creating an awe-inspiring sight. Then, explore the Underwater Zoo, home to fascinating creatures like playful otters, massive crocodiles, and colourful amphibians. Wander through interactive exhibits, get up close with unique marine species, and learn about the wonders of the ocean in a fun and engaging way. Whether you're marvelling at the beauty of the deep sea or meeting incredible wildlife, this experience is perfect for all ages. After an unforgettable adventure, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, leaving you with mesmerizing memories of Dubai’s underwater world.

Explore the wonders of Abu Dhabi, a city where tradition meets modern luxury, on an unforgettable tour! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a seamless and comfortable journey. Start your adventure at the majestic Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque, where shimmering chandeliers, intricate carvings, and gleaming white domes create a sight to behold. Then, enjoy a scenic drive along the Corniche, soaking in breath-taking coastal views. Step into the past at the Heritage Village, where you’ll discover the UAE’s deep-rooted traditions. Admire the opulence of Emirates Palace, snap photos of the striking Etihad Towers, and visit the regal Qasr Al Watan, a palace showcasing the country’s rich heritage. If time permits, browse a local market for souvenirs. After an incredible day of exploration, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Start your day with a delightful breakfast before embarking on an exhilarating Desert Safari that promises adventure and cultural charm! Our friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up in a luxurious 4x4 land cruiser, ready to whisk you away into the golden dunes of Dubai. Feel the rush of dune bashing, sandboarding, and a camel ride, or take it up a notch with an optional quad biking adventure. As the sun paints the sky in fiery hues, unwind at a traditional Bedouin camp, where a sumptuous BBQ dinner awaits, paired with mesmerizing Belly Dance and Tanoura performances. End the night with a smooth hotel drop-off, taking home memories of an enchanting desert escape.

packages.overview:
Touch down in Dubai as the dawn light dances on the Burj Khalifa, and let Travelxploria whisk you through VIP airport service into a sleek waterfront suite on the Marina—your home for the next seven nights, complete with infinity‐pool toasts against a panoramic skyline. Wander the fragrant spice and gold souks of Old Dubai with a private storyteller, then soar over the Palm Jumeirah in a bespoke helicopter tour before unwinding with a spa ritual at Atlantis, The Palm. Swap city lights for desert skies on a thrilling dune-bashing excursion and private Bedouin-camp barbecue under starlight, then explore Alserkal Avenue’s vibrant art studios and breeze through the Museum of the Future with fast-track access. Savor an interactive cooking class with an Emirati chef after meandering the Ripe Market, recline on a sun-lounger with mocktails at JBR, and choose between kitesurfing at Kite Beach, a private yacht cruise, or dawn paddleboarding past the Burj Al Arab—all seamlessly arranged by Travelxploria’s around-the-clock concierge—before a flawless departure transfer and fond farewell that leaves you already dreaming of your next adventure.

​

As you arrive at Dubai International Airport, the gateway to luxury and adventure, a warm welcome awaits you from our dedicated Travelxploria representative. With the best on-ground support staff ensuring a seamless experience, you’ll be escorted to your hotel in comfort. Take in the stunning skyline as you settle into this vibrant city where modern marvels meet timeless traditions. With every detail is taken care of, allowing you to relax and immerse yourself in the wonders of Dubai.

Whether you want a sunrise getaway, a midday adventure, or a breathtaking sunset cruise, set sail on a luxurious yacht at the preference of the guest. After picking you up from your hotel, your Travelxploria representative will make the easy transition to the marina, where your private or shared yacht is waiting for you. Pass famous sites like the Burj Al Arab, Atlantis the Palm, and the stunning Dubai Marina skyline as you glide across the Arabian Gulf's glittering waters. Savour cool beverages, unwind on the sun deck, and take in the expansive views of the coast. This yacht experience offers luxury activities, whether you're looking for a romantic retreat, a fun family outing, or a wild celebration you can enjoy all. We'll make sure you have a comfortable ride back to your hotel.

After a delicious breakfast, get ready for an unforgettable adventure through the heart of Dubai! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and experienced guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable start to your day. With the best on-ground support staff, embark on a journey that showcases the perfect blend of tradition and modernity. Step into history at the Dubai Museum, where ancient artifacts and immersive exhibits bring the city’s past to life. Wander through the bustling Gold and Spice Souks, where vibrant colors and rich aromas create an unforgettable sensory experience. Drive along the stunning coastline, stopping for breathtaking views of the Burj Al Arab and the luxurious Palm Jumeirah. Explore the charming Al Fahidi Historical District, and end your tour at the awe-inspiring Dubai Frame, offering panoramic views of old and new Dubai. After a day filled with discovery, relax as we drop you back at your hotel. With Travelxploria, the best travel agency, every moment of your Dubai tour is designed for an extraordinary experience.

Get ready for an unforgettable experience as you soar to the 124th and 125th floors of the Burj Khalifa, the world’s tallest building! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey. With your entry ticket included, step into the high-speed elevator and feel the excitement as you ascend to breath-taking heights in seconds. Once at the top, step onto the observation deck and take in unmatched panoramic views of Dubai’s skyline, golden desert, and shimmering coastline. Whether you're capturing photos, gazing through the interactive telescopes, or simply soaking in the awe-inspiring scenery, this is a moment to cherish. After thisonce-in-a-lifetime experience, sit back and relaxas wedrop you back at your hotel.

packages.overview: Dubai is where the past meets the future in a dazzling spectacle of luxury and culture—and with Travelxploria at the helm, every moment becomes effortless magic: imagine touching down as the golden sands glow, stepping straight into a VIP transfer to your waterfront suite beneath futuristic skyscrapers, before wandering vibrant souks with a local storyteller, then soaring above the skyline in a private helicopter arranged by our team. We blend innovation and tradition by fast-tracking your Museum of the Future tickets, guiding you on a Bedouin-camp barbecue under desert stars, and curating world-class shopping and adventure-filled experiences—from kitesurfing lessons at dawn to secluded rooftop dinners on the Marina—all stitched together seamlessly by Travelxploria’s concierge so that your Dubai dream unfolds exactly as you’ve imagined.
